---
title: "Projects"
---

This page contains completed projects from my courses at Lawrence University

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## CMSC405: Advanced Data Computing

### R-Package Presentation

This is a presentation made with Quarto in RStudio. In it, I explore the basics of KPolen, an R package made by
Karl Polen for private equity mathemetical computation and portfolio analysis.

[View on RPubs](https://rpubs.com/reeceo/1429563){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

---

### Article Summary Poster

This is a poster created using the package posterdown. It contains a brief summary of the article:
The Split-Apply-Combine Strategy for Data Analysis by Hadley Wickham. This was a collaborative project, worked on with
Tahana Akram, a fellow student in CMSC405.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/ADC-405-S26/Project_5_PaperPoster_Team_11){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

---

### R-Package "pegap" 

pegap is a package developed by myself in an effort to cover the gaps in private equity portfolio analysis in R. 
The name stems from this: "pe" = private equity, "gap" = gap in the field. Currently, the package contains the following functions:

- vintage_diversification_score() — scores how concentrated a PE portfolio is across vintage years using HHI
- unfunded_liability_schedule() — forecasts future capital calls across a 5-year schedule with a preset drawdown curve
- portfolio_plot() — visualises portfolio progress by vintage year as a scatterplot

I intend to update this package post-graduation to include many more functions.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/ADC-405-S26/pegap){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[View Package](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/pegap/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}


---

### Project 3 - Text Analysis 

This was a collaborative project with Nga Nguyen (Daisy), a fellow student. We aimed to use data visualisation and sentiment analysis to investigate 
trends within the Harry Potter Series, specifically within the text itself. 

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/ADC-405-S26/Project_3_TextAnalysis_Team_14){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

---

### Project 2 - SQL

Working with Binh Vu, a classmate, this project was an introduction to SQL functions. We used SQL Queries, DuckDB, and Visualisation in RStudio 
to analyze the TidyTuesday survey data on how individuals interpret probabilistic language. 

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/ADC-405-S26/Project_2_SQL_Team_10){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

---

:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## ECON602: Senior Research Experience
### Capstone — Effect of Legalising Recreational Marijuana on State Employment

Research Question: Does legalising recreational marijuana have an impact on state-level employment?

Methodology: Difference-in-Differences model using state and year fixed effects

How: Utilised event study graphs, regression tables, and propensity score matching in RStudio

Data: Tidied, wrangled, and processed over 300,000 observations across 25 variables.

Final Dataset included economic, demographic, geographic controls for all 50 states between the years 2000-2022. These included variables such as GDP, Population, Race, and Region. 


[View Capstone PDF](files/capstone.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

---
:::
